omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Key Points
We will...
• Only show data which you've made publicly visible on your profile.
• Show your profile to other users of our website romeo.com and our ROMEO apps
and to users of hunqz.com.
• Not sell or trade your data to third party organizations.
